prerequisite_concepts.name: Absolute Fitness
prerequisite_concepts.definition: Fitness measured on an absolute scale before normalization.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 归一化之前、按绝对尺度衡量的适合度。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Strength of Stabilizing Selection
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A parameter describing how strongly selection pulls trait values toward an optimum.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 描述稳定化选择把性状拉向最优值强度的参数。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Change
prerequisite_concepts.definition: Under the assumption of weak selection on the focal trait, we can add the change from stabilizing selection to obtain the approximate total allele-frequency change.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: Change 是当前公式中使用的函数或算子，用来把输入量转换为模型需要的输出。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Mean Trait Value
prerequisite_concepts.definition: The population average of the trait value across all classes or individuals.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 群体中性状值的平均水平。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Optimal Trait Value
prerequisite_concepts.definition: The trait value at which the fitness function reaches its optimum.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 使适合度函数达到最大值的性状取值。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Component
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A component representing additive genetic contribution in the model.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 表示加性遗传贡献的模型组成部分。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Probability
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A quantity measuring how likely an event or state transition is.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量某个事件或状态转移发生可能性的数量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Time
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A quantity indexing the stage, generation, or interval of the process.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 表示过程所处阶段、世代或时间间隔的量。

introduced_concepts.name: Time
